name: Objects
description:
Object-focused modules for Hirki Plus Patch (H.P.P.).

This parent module groups map object and adventure-map structure changes. These modules modify or improve existing objects, creature banks, buildings, and other map interactions, often providing additional support for other Hirki Plus Patch (H.P.P.) gameplay modules.

Detailed reward values, guard setups, object scope, and compatibility notes are described in the individual child modules.

## Current Object Modules

* **Spit - Hydra Reward** — turns **Spit** into a Fortress-flavored creature bank reward, replacing gold with **Hydras** while keeping the original guards, visuals, layout, terrain placement, and object behavior.
author: bew_
